mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: Gray or any touch of Blue. We'd love our guests to dress in smart casual or semi-formal attire in this palette. Please avoid wearing white so the bride can shine.

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: For Ninongs: Formal suit in gray/blue. For Ninangs: Floor-length dress/gown in gray or any touch of blue.

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Gray or any touch of Blue. Smart casual or semi-formal.
